description: As a facility manager, configure the input processing for a water meter (Node: 'utility_room', Input: 'main_water_pulses') that generates 1 pulse for every 10 Liters. Create a PHPFina feed named 'water_total_m3' to track cumulative volume in cubic meters (m³) and a PHPFina feed named 'water_flow_lpm' to track the flow rate in Liters per minute. Both feeds must use a 10s interval. The input is currently receiving data but has no processing configured.
